title: GovernedSpineBoundaryV1
description: Deployment boundary between Tri-Core routing and Nexus OS execution observability.

tri_core_routing_authority.description: Thalamus routing lane ID (nova_face). Not tri-core-protocol governance.

aaes_execution_module_id.description: AAES module invoked at spine step 3. Default nexus execution module.

nexusos_fos_export_enabled.description: When true, optional FOS civilization export (nexusos.continuity bucket).
